text.title: Cutover Rollback Runbook Template Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Cutover Rollback Runbook Template methodology end-to-end. Each step declares input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: enumerate-waves
step.action: Decompose into ordered waves with blast radius + entry criteria.
step.decision-gate: Single-wave migrations: route to deploy-blue-green-canary instead.

step.name: draft-per-wave-steps
step.action: Per wave: executed steps, gate checks, rollback path, comms cadence.
step.decision-gate: Each wave MUST have a rollback path.

step.name: rehearse-rollback-staging
step.action: Run rollback for each wave in staging; attach evidence.
step.decision-gate: If rollback fails in staging, STOP — fix before production cutover.

step.name: compose-comms-tree
step.action: List names + channels + paging order per wave.
step.decision-gate: Each wave must name a single ICR (incident commander on rotation).
